description: List of names associated with numbers of dirhams, probably recipients of alms. Names include: Salāma al-Saqqāʾ and his son; Abū l-Ḥusayn and his brothers; Makhlūf Ibn Jāsūs; Shemaʿya and his brother; Hassūn al-Qarqī(?); Ṣāliḥ and ʿAṭiyya and his two sons; Khalfa and his brother; Abū Yusuf; Abū Isḥāq. (Information in part from CUDL.)
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
